title: Evangelion 30 out November 17
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion 3.0 out November 17 Post by Chrad » Sun Jul 01, 2012 7:12 am There you have it.

[]: Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Sun Jul 01, 2012 7:26 am Source, or it's not true.

[]: Post by Pomme » Sun Jul 01, 2012 7:39 am Source here : http://www.ustream.tv/recorded/23692353

[]: Post by Kuronekodou » Sun Jul 01, 2012 7:40 am And here ;D http://www.twitvid.com/YXP2I Edit: Another one ;D http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=A7J458uvHSk

[]: Post by Pomme » Sun Jul 01, 2012 7:47 am Kuronekodou wrote: And here ;D http://www.twitvid.com/YXP2I

[]: Post by Chrad » Sun Jul 01, 2012 7:50 am Pomme wrote: Oh yeah that quality :yum:, but why again show us Asuka ? What about the others ?

[]: Post by mastervampire » Sun Jul 01, 2012 7:52 am Pomme wrote: Oh yeah that quality :yum:, but why again show us Asuka ? What about the others ?

[]: Post by bobbyfischer's ghost » Sun Jul 01, 2012 7:55 am I'm so exited I woke up my Dog! I wish they could have shown us a bit of Shinji though.

[]: Post by Fazmotron » Sun Jul 01, 2012 8:04 am News Post. Also, WOWOWOWOWOWOOWOOWOWOWOWOWOWO.

[]: Post by Deepak » Sun Jul 01, 2012 8:12 am well I obviously could tell what that trailer was showing...

[]: Post by bobbyfischer's ghost » Sun Jul 01, 2012 8:15 am Deepak wrote: well I obviously could tell what that trailer was showing...

[]: Post by liquidus118 » Sun Jul 01, 2012 8:18 am Can anyone make out what the blue tendrily thing is? Or the red thing it keeps cutting to is? Judging by what we see of Earth either Third Impact happens or Near-Third Impact was a lot nearer than I thought. We need a better quality video or some screenshots, ASAP.

[]: Post by Twin Drive Sigma Aquarion » Sun Jul 01, 2012 8:29 am Arael (or a third new angel) confirmed for coming back! It's the last angel not get an appearance, be it direct or in spirit, so I'm good with this. Now if only they can confirm the real names of Kushiel and Othniel.

[]: Post by Fireball » Sun Jul 01, 2012 8:31 am I can't make shit out what's going on but hell yeah for news.

[]: Post by liquidus118 » Sun Jul 01, 2012 8:37 am Twin Drive Sigma Aquarion wrote: Arael (or a third new angel) confirmed for coming back! It's the last angel not get an appearance, be it direct or in spirit, so I'm good with this. Now if only they can confirm the real names of Kushiel and Othniel.

[]: Post by symbv » Sun Jul 01, 2012 8:40 am The news has also been published in the movie magazine Cinema Today already: http://www.cinematoday.jp/page/N0043621 SPOILER: Show

[]: Post by bobbyfischer's ghost » Sun Jul 01, 2012 8:41 am liquidus118 wrote: Also, is it just me or is Unit 02 in Beast mode and being directly controlled by Asuka like Mari against Zeruel?

[]: Post by InstrumentalityOne » Sun Jul 01, 2012 8:42 am I lost it when one guy in the audience exclaimed "Omedetou!"

[]: Post by liquidus118 » Sun Jul 01, 2012 8:43 am bobbyfischer's ghost wrote: It was a backdoor code that Mari used maybe Asuka learned the method.

[]: Post by bobbyfischer's ghost » Sun Jul 01, 2012 8:47 am ^I wonder if their going to do a variant of the mind rape scene?
